
### browser fingerprinting (1) 


![](/web/browser-fp-survey-tbl3){}
 [P. Laperdrix et al, ‘‘Browser Fingerprinting: A Survey’’ (2020; ACM TotW)]{.mycredit}

### browser fingerprinting (2) 


![](/web/browser-fp-survey-tbl4){}
 [P. Laperdrix et al, ‘‘Browser Fingerprinting: A Survey’’ (2020; ACM TotW)]{.mycredit}
